incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols for Ava on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Check how many stickers Ava collected and what the scale tells you.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols for Ava on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Ava has 7 stickers. Each symbol equals 2 stickers, so you need 3 full symbols plus a half-symbol for the extra 1.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: System places 3 full symbols and 1 half-symbol in Ava's row, demonstrating the correct placement for 7 stickers with a scale of 2

steps.text: This is tricky, so let me show you. Ava collected 7 stickers. Each symbol represents 2 stickers. So we place 3 full symbols—that's 6 stickers. Then we add a half-symbol for the remaining 1 sticker. 3 and a half symbols total.
